description: Round 2: official source pages for the 66 limited_but_safe research-funding programs (portal-only sourceUrl). Promote sets real official sourceUrl (portal kept as applicationLink) so they reach student_ready under the relaxed-formalization policy. Holds = aggregators / post-bacc / no usable official page. URLs verified via web research 2026-06.
